problems.name: Kth Largest Element in an Array
Two Sum
Searching In Array

solutions.code:
<?php
function binarySearch($arr, $x) {
    $low = 0;
    $high = sizeof($arr) - 1;
    while ($low <= $high) {
        $mid = $low + ($high - $low) / 2;
        if ($arr[$mid] == $x)
            return floor($mid);
        if ($arr[$mid] < $x)
            $low = $mid + 1;
        else
            $high = $mid - 1;
    }
    return -1;
}
